prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-BEEDBK-2PC-3-FBA Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Collectible Black Eagle Decorative Hunting Knife Description: The Collectible ASR Outdoor Black Eagle Knife with Sheath would be a great addition to any knife-collector's collection.

The Black Eagle Knife would also be great for any outdoorsman that wants their blade to be both functional and beautiful. The blade of the dagger is 7" in length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel.

The blade itself has a great acid etched design to give it style. The scabbard features a beautifully colored picture of a flying eagle while the pommel of the handle is a chrome eagle head. Search Terms: rebel flag prideful native american soaring eagle knife collectible dagger gift set knives indian man animal head pride eagle american flag usa knife with sheath Features: - SPECIAL EDITION DECORATIVE KNIFE: These wild animal daggers are quite the addition to any knife collection set: The Animal Head Fixed Blade Hunting Daggers feature an intricate outdoor graphic design of their spirit in full color from scabbard and handle - PREMIUM QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: Constructed from 440 stainless steel these fixed blade animal head knives have an eye catching and heavy weighted 8 inch acid etched blade while overall being 13.75 inches in length - MATCHING SHEATH AND HANDLE: Each piece is designed so that the sheath, etched blade, and handle work together and say something meaningful about the owner as a person - WILDLIFE FIXED BLADE DECORATIVE COLLECTORS KNIFE: With several different styles and animals available you can collect and display your favorite to compliment each other and impress your friends - UNIQUE AND ENJOYABLE: Makes a great addition to any knife collection or wildlife enthusiast center piece === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Black Eagle Decorative Hunting Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.75in Black Collectible Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, 7 Inch Acid Etched Blade, Eagle Head Pommel, Matching Sheath, Collectible

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Acid Etched 8" Blade, Eagle Head Pommel, Colorful Eagle Scabbard, Collectible Display Gift
